intro: Refreshed regularly rather than written once and left to go stale. This isn't a live sales-rank feed (Amazon's own bestseller pages block automated checking) — it's a periodic pass across UK retailer bestsellers, trend coverage, and Amazon's own rankings where visible, compiled honestly rather than scraped.

items.why: The dominant 2026 living-room trend across UK interiors coverage — mixing chunky knit, velvet, and bouclé does more for a small room than a single patterned statement piece.
items.product: Dunelm chunky knit throw + IKEA GURLI cushion covers
items.source: Cross-referenced UK interiors trend coverage, July 2026.

items.why: Mushroom, soft beige, and warm taupe tones are displacing the cool-grey palette that dominated the last few years — shows up consistently across current UK living-room roundups.
items.product: Look for throws, rugs, and cushion covers in warm neutral tones rather than grey when restocking soft furnishings
items.source: Cross-referenced UK interiors trend coverage, July 2026.

items.why: Command-strip and adhesive-shelf search interest keeps climbing as more of the UK rents long-term — not a fad, a structural shift in who's decorating.
items.product: Command Picture Hanging Extra Large Strips (Set of 10)
items.source: Cross-referenced Argos UK listing and renter-decor coverage, July 2026.

items.why: Storage ottomans and fold-away tables are the most consistently recommended space-saving buy across current small-flat furniture guides — doing two jobs beats doing one job cheaply.
items.source: Cross-referenced Dunelm UK listing and space-saving furniture coverage, July 2026.

sources: Amazon UK Movers & Shakers (Home & Garden) where accessible
Dunelm, Argos, and IKEA UK current listings
Cross-referenced UK interiors trend coverage, July 2026
